title: stelis crinita
intro: Stelis crinita, also known as the "bearded stelis," is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis crinita are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant. Stelis crinita can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, where the leaves and flowers are typically steeped in hot water to release their medicinal compounds.
